_notes: Shared asset registry used by BOTH the Go indexer and scripts/init_assets.ts.
Addresses/feed-ids below came from research (2026-07-11) and are annotated with confidence.
VERIFY every 'confidence: medium' or lower on Solscan before hardcoding into a mainnet deploy.
trust_tier (0-3, MANUALLY set): 3=redeemable/custodial, 0=purely synthetic. PROVISIONAL — review.
underlying_ticker groups cross-issuer wrappers of the same equity (CRCLx + CRCLON -> CRCL).
PRICE REFERENCE — research finding: Pyth publishes NO sponsored on-chain equity price accounts,
so we key off Hermes feed IDs (pull model) instead of a Solana price-account pubkey.
pyth_feed_kind='xstock_crypto' -> 24/7 Crypto.<T>X/USD feed (best for the tokenized token itself).
pyth_feed_kind='equity'       -> Equity.US.<T>/USD feed (US market hours only; widen-conf when closed).
CAVEAT: regular equity feeds may move to Pyth Pro after the 2026-07-31 Core upgrade — reconfirm.
LIQUIDITY — research finding: these tokens are canonical SPL mints with liquidity spread across many
AMM pools (Meteora-dominant) + Jupiter aggregation. Rather than hardcode one pool, the indexer should
derive price + 1%-depth from Jupiter quotes (simulate increasing size until 1% impact) and/or enumerate
pools via GeckoTerminal/Birdeye. primary_dex='jupiter' selects that path.

assets.mint_confidence: medium — from Pyth redemption-rate contract_id; verify on Solscan
assets.notes: Circle stock via xStocks. Flagship cross-issuer comparison vs CRCLON. 24/7 CRCLX/USD feed.

assets.mint_confidence: high — verified on Solana mainnet via getAccountInfo; Token-2022, 9 decimals, metadata self-hosted on ondo.finance
assets.notes: Ondo Global Markets tokenized Circle. Same underlying as CRCLx, different issuer (flagship comparison). WARNING: Ondo's model is primary mint/redeem, not DEX-first — on-chain DEX liquidity is thin, so the Jupiter depth read may return little; the liquidity_component will (correctly) score low and mint/burn velocity is the more informative signal here. Uses market-hours CRCL equity feed; consider CRCLX crypto feed for parity with CRCLx.

assets.mint_confidence: high — vanity mint corroborated by Solscan + Solana Compass
assets.notes: SpaceX is PRIVATE — Pyth has NO feed (confirmed). Premium component must be DISABLED or use a manual last-round mark for this asset. The June-2026 procurement blow-up case; liquidity + mint/burn signals still apply.

assets.mint_confidence: medium — from Pyth redemption-rate contract_id; verify on Solscan
assets.notes: Apple via xStocks. High liquidity — good baseline/control asset. 24/7 AAPLX/USD feed.

assets.mint_confidence: medium — from Pyth redemption-rate contract_id; verify on Solscan
medium-high — vanity mint from CoinGecko; eyeball on Solscan
assets.notes: Micron via Backpack/Sunrise. No xStock 24/7 feed exists — must use market-hours Equity.US.MU/USD with strict staleness handling. Meteora MU/USDC is the dominant pool.
Pick the LOWEST-volume name on xstocks.fi — thin liquidity makes the liquidity_component interesting.
